title: Circular Hilltop Villa in Lombok
blurb: A bold, sculptural retreat built as a full circle around a tree-filled courtyard, perched on a Lombok hilltop — a curved infinity pool over the farms and ocean, warm terracotta tones, and a private cinema.
detail:
A bold architectural retreat that integrates with Lombok's landscape through a striking circular design, perched on a privileged hilltop that opens to nature in every direction — ever-changing light, views and atmosphere from sunrise to sunset. On arrival, vertical timber slats, a skylight and a tranquil reflecting pond create a spectacular entrance and a magical interplay of light and shadow through the day.

At the heart of the home, a lush central courtyard with mature trees anchors the space and grounds its circular flow. Four spacious bedrooms, each with an en-suite bathroom, offer refined comfort, privacy and their own views. The generous living area flows seamlessly out to a curved infinity pool overlooking an organic farm below, swaying palms and the endless Indian Ocean — a perfect place to gather, unwind or simply take in the surroundings.

Warm terracotta tones and natural textures give the villa a calm, earthy character, while sculptural circular gardens invite quiet contemplation. For entertainment, there is a private cinema room and a pool table — sculptural architecture, natural materials and panoramic views combining into a serene place to connect, reflect and recharge.
